name: Chicken Ratatouille Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Eggplant (peeled and chopped into coarse pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients and mix well.
2. Transfer the mixture to a 3-1/2 to 4-quart crockpot.
3. Cover; cook on LOW for 8 to 10 hours or until chicken is tender and no longer pink.
